title: sphenomeris spathulata
intro: Sphenomeris spathulata, also known as the Japanese five-spur grass or Japanese five-spur fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Sphenomeris spathulata include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. Sphenomeris spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are believed to be beneficial for overall health when used in moderation.
